ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model correctly identified old park star (ranked 1st with 22.0% predicted probability). Strong analytical framework.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Old Park Star > Leader d'Allier, but actual result was Old Park Star > Sober Glory. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Old Park Star showed negative divergence (-6.6%): Model overvalued at 22.0% vs Market 28.6%. Market sentiment more accurate than model.
